sentence: 今天报纸上的社论写得很有道理。
pinyin: Jīntiān bàozhǐ shang de shèlùn xiě de hěn yǒu dàolǐ.
english: The editorial in today's newspaper makes a lot of sense.

sentence: 他仪表整洁，给面试官留下了好印象。
pinyin: Tā yí biǎo zhěngjié, gěi miànshìguān liú xià le hǎo yìnxiàng.
english: His neat appearance made a good impression on the interviewer.

meaning: 1. to underline; 2. bottom line; 3. base line (in sports); 4. baseline
sentence: 价格再低我也有底线，不能白干。
pinyin: Jiàgé zài dī wǒ yě yǒu dǐxiàn, bù néng báigàn.
english: No matter how low the price goes, I have a bottom line — I can't work for nothing.

meaning: 1. pattern; 2. way of doing sth; 3. trick; 4. (sports) fancy-style (as
pinyin: Tā yòu zài wán shénme xīn huāyàng?
english: What new tricks is he up to now?

meaning: 1. along the line (e.g. railway); 2. the region near the line
sentence: 高铁沿线开了很多新的商业区。
pinyin: Gāo tiě yán xiàn kāi le hěn duō xīn de shāng yè qū.
english: Many new commercial districts have opened along the high-speed rail line.
